description: OneFlare — Cloudflare Threat Detection. WAF web attacks, credential attacks, DNS/C2 tunneling, and data exfil / bot / AI threats, from Cloudflare Logpush parsed to OCSF in the SDL.

graphs.title: OneFlare — Cloudflare Threat Detection
graphs.markdown: Live view of the NovaMind attack surface on Cloudflare, parsed to OCSF in the SDL. **Attacks** are derived from Cloudflare's WAF ML attack scores (1-99, **lower = more malicious**) and Firewall-event blocks. Tabs drill into each scenario: web-app (WAF), credential, DNS/C2, and exfil/bot/AI. Zero rows = nothing in the window; widen the time picker.

graphs.title: HTTP Requests
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: WAF Blocks
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Firewall events'
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Likely Web Attacks
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let sqli=number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore), xss=number(unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore), rce=number(unmapped.WAFRCEAttackScore)
| filter (sqli>=1 and sqli<=20) or (xss>=1 and xss<=20) or (rce>=1 and rce<=20)
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Attacker IPs
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let sqli=number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore), xss=number(unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore), rce=number(unmapped.WAFRCEAttackScore)
| filter (sqli>=1 and sqli<=20) or (xss>=1 and xss<=20) or (rce>=1 and rce<=20)
| group c=estimate_distinct(src_endpoint.ip)
| limit 1

graphs.title: Gateway DNS Queries
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4003 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Gateway DNS'
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Countries Seen
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| group c=estimate_distinct(src_endpoint.location.country)
| limit 1

graphs.title: HTTP Requests Over Time by Response Class
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let code=number(unmapped.EdgeResponseStatus)
| let cls = code>=500 ? '5xx Server Error' : code>=400 ? '4xx Client Error / Blocked' : code>=300 ? '3xx Redirect' : '2xx OK'
| group c=count() by cls, timestamp=timebucket('1h')
| transpose cls on timestamp

graphs.title: Attack Types (WAF ML score ≤ 20)
graphs.query:
| union
(
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let s=number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore)
| filter s>=1 and s<=20
| group Count=count() by Type='SQL Injection'
),
(
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let s=number(unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore)
| filter s>=1 and s<=20
| group Count=count() by Type='XSS'
),
(
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let s=number(unmapped.WAFRCEAttackScore)
| filter s>=1 and s<=20
| group Count=count() by Type='Traversal / RCE'
)
| columns Type, Count

graphs.title: Top Source Countries
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| group c=count() by country=src_endpoint.location.country
| filter c>0
| sort -c
| limit 15

graphs.title: Top Attacker IPs
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let sqli=number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore), xss=number(unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore), rce=number(unmapped.WAFRCEAttackScore)
| filter (sqli>=1 and sqli<=20) or (xss>=1 and xss<=20) or (rce>=1 and rce<=20)
| let worst = (sqli>=1 and sqli<=20) ? sqli : (xss>=1 and xss<=20) ? xss : rce
| group hits=count(), lowest_score=min(worst) by ip=src_endpoint.ip, country=src_endpoint.location.country
| sort -hits
| limit 20
| columns "Attacker IP"=ip, "Country"=country, "Attack Requests"=hits, "Lowest WAF Score"=lowest_score

graphs.title: WAF Blocks (Firewall Events)
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Firewall events'
| group hits=count() by host=http_request.url.hostname, act=action, ua=http_request.user_agent, ip=src_endpoint.ip, country=src_endpoint.location.country
| sort -hits
| limit 25
| columns "Target Host"=host, "Action"=act, "User Agent"=ua, "Source IP"=ip, "Country"=country, "Blocks"=hits

graphs.title: Web Application Attacks — Cloudflare WAF ML scores
graphs.markdown: Every request carries Cloudflare's per-attack ML score (1-99). We flag **score ≤ 20** (near-certain attack). SQLi/XSS use their dedicated scores; path-traversal/LFI is caught by the RCE score **plus** raw-URI patterns. Scores are emitted on 200s too — this catches attacks that slipped past the managed ruleset, not just blocked hits.

graphs.title: SQLi Requests
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let s=number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore)
| filter s>=1 and s<=20
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: XSS Requests
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let s=number(unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore)
| filter s>=1 and s<=20
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Traversal / RCE
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let s=number(unmapped.WAFRCEAttackScore)
| filter s>=1 and s<=20
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Attacked Hosts
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let sqli=number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore), xss=number(unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore), rce=number(unmapped.WAFRCEAttackScore)
| filter (sqli>=1 and sqli<=20) or (xss>=1 and xss<=20) or (rce>=1 and rce<=20)
| group c=estimate_distinct(http_request.url.hostname)
| limit 1

graphs.title: SQL Injection — lowest-scoring requests
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let s=number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore)
| filter s>=1 and s<=20
| group hits=count(), worst=min(s) by uri=http_request.url.url_string, ip=src_endpoint.ip, country=src_endpoint.location.country
| sort worst
| limit 25
| columns "Request URI"=uri, "Source IP"=ip, "Country"=country, "Requests"=hits, "WAF Score (lower=worse)"=worst

graphs.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) — lowest-scoring requests
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let s=number(unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore)
| filter s>=1 and s<=20
| group hits=count(), worst=min(s) by uri=http_request.url.url_string, ip=src_endpoint.ip, country=src_endpoint.location.country
| sort worst
| limit 25
| columns "Request URI"=uri, "Source IP"=ip, "Country"=country, "Requests"=hits, "WAF Score (lower=worse)"=worst

graphs.title: Path Traversal / LFI (RCE score ≤ 20 OR raw-URI pattern)
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let s=number(unmapped.WAFRCEAttackScore)
| filter (s>=1 and s<=20) or http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/etc/passwd") or http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("../") or http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("%2e%2e")
| group hits=count() by uri=http_request.url.url_string, ip=src_endpoint.ip, country=src_endpoint.location.country
| sort -hits
| limit 25
| columns "Request URI"=uri, "Source IP"=ip, "Country"=country, "Requests"=hits

graphs.title: Attacks by Target Host
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| let sqli=number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore), xss=number(unmapped.WAFXSSAttackScore), rce=number(unmapped.WAFRCEAttackScore)
| filter (sqli>=1 and sqli<=20) or (xss>=1 and xss<=20) or (rce>=1 and rce<=20)
| group c=count() by host=http_request.url.hostname
| filter c>0
| columns host, c

graphs.title: Credential Attacks — portal & shop login
graphs.markdown: Credential stuffing and brute force against `/login` on portal.* and shop.*. Failed logins surface as **401 / 403 / 429** edge responses. A single source IP with many failures across many usernames = stuffing; many passwords against one account = brute force.

graphs.title: Login Attempts
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/login")
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Failed Logins
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/login")
| filter unmapped.EdgeResponseStatus in ('401','403','429')
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Source IPs
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/login")
| group c=estimate_distinct(src_endpoint.ip)
| limit 1

graphs.title: Targeted Hosts
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/login")
| group c=estimate_distinct(http_request.url.hostname)
| limit 1

graphs.title: Login Attempts Over Time by Response Status
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/login")
| group c=count() by status=unmapped.EdgeResponseStatus, timestamp=timebucket('30m')
| transpose status on timestamp

graphs.title: Login Response Status
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/login")
| group c=count() by status=unmapped.EdgeResponseStatus
| filter c>0
| columns status, c

graphs.title: Failed Logins by Source IP
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/login")
| filter unmapped.EdgeResponseStatus in ('401','403','429')
| group failures=count() by ip=src_endpoint.ip, host=http_request.url.hostname, country=src_endpoint.location.country
| sort -failures
| limit 25
| columns "Source IP"=ip, "Target Host"=host, "Country"=country, "Failed Logins"=failures

graphs.title: DNS Tunneling / C2 Beaconing — Cloudflare Gateway DNS
graphs.markdown: Gateway DNS resolver logs. DNS tunneling / DGA is distinguished by **randomness and long leftmost labels**, not by volume alone. The suspicious-label table flags query names whose leftmost label exceeds 25 chars (data-in-DNS exfil / dnscat2-style tunneling).

graphs.title: DNS Queries
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4003 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Gateway DNS'
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Distinct Domains
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4003 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Gateway DNS'
| group c=estimate_distinct(unmapped.QueryName)
| limit 1

graphs.title: Long-Label Queries (>25)
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4003 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Gateway DNS'
| let label = replace(unmapped.QueryName, '[.].*', '')
| filter len(label) > 25
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: DNS Query Volume Over Time
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4003 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Gateway DNS'
| group c=count() by timestamp=timebucket('1h')

graphs.title: Query Type
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4003 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Gateway DNS'
| group c=count() by qtype=query.type
| filter c>0
| columns qtype, c

graphs.title: Suspicious Long-Label Queries (tunneling / DGA)
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4003 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Gateway DNS'
| let fqdn=unmapped.QueryName
| let label = replace(fqdn, '[.].*', '')
| let label_len = len(label)
| filter label_len > 25
| group queries=count(), max_label=max(label_len) by domain=fqdn, src=src_endpoint.ip
| sort -max_label
| limit 25
| columns "Query Name"=domain, "Source IP"=src, "Leftmost Label Len"=max_label, "Queries"=queries

graphs.title: Top Queried Domains
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4003 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'Gateway DNS'
| group queries=count() by domain=unmapped.QueryName
| sort -queries
| limit 20
| columns "Domain"=domain, "Queries"=queries

graphs.title: Data Exfiltration, Bots & AI Threats — the API surface (api.*)
graphs.markdown: Bulk data exfil via `/export`, API enumeration, polymorphic AI-bot scraping, and prompt injection on the Pyxis `/api/v1/chat` endpoint. The bot tell is **one source cycling many User-Agents**: a single automated client rotating its UA to look like many browsers/SDKs, while its real client identity (source IP) stays constant.

graphs.title: Export Requests
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/export")
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Max Export Bytes
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/export")
| group c=max(number(unmapped.EdgeResponseBytes))
| limit 1

graphs.title: API Requests
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/api/v1/")
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Prompt-Injection POSTs
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/chat")
| filter http_request.http_method = 'POST'
| group c=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Top API Data Pulls (by response size)
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| filter http_request.url.url_string contains:anycase("/api/v1/")
| group hits=count(), max_bytes=max(number(unmapped.EdgeResponseBytes)) by uri=http_request.url.url_string, ip=src_endpoint.ip
| sort -max_bytes
| limit 25
| columns "API Endpoint"=uri, "Source IP"=ip, "Requests"=hits, "Max Response Bytes"=max_bytes

graphs.title: Polymorphic Bot Tell — one source, many User-Agents
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| group requests=count(), distinct_uas=estimate_distinct(http_request.user_agent) by ip=src_endpoint.ip, country=src_endpoint.location.country
| filter distinct_uas > 1
| sort -distinct_uas
| limit 20
| columns "Source IP"=ip, "Country"=country, "Distinct User-Agents"=distinct_uas, "Requests"=requests

graphs.title: Top User-Agents
graphs.query:
class_uid = 4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset = 'HTTP Requests'
| group requests=count(), distinct_ips=estimate_distinct(src_endpoint.ip) by ua=http_request.user_agent
| sort -requests
| limit 20
| columns "User Agent"=ua, "Requests"=requests, "Distinct IPs"=distinct_ips
